sections.heading: Risk Factors
sections.content:
Unknown etiology for thymoma: The etiology of thymomas is unknown. Alcohol, tobacco smoking, and ionizing radiation do not appear to be risk factors for thymomas. (Strong) [3]
Race/Ethnicity (for thymoma): The incidence of thymomas is reported to be higher among Black and Asian individuals. (Moderate) [3,122]
